title: What do the Blue vs Grey Icons mean in the Updates Section?
excerpt: What are the different for blue and grey conversation icons?

posts.author: Man_Ng (Man Ng)
posts.cookedHtml: What are the different for blue and grey conversation icons?

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Blue means the last update is 7 days old or less.

Grey means no new updates for more than 7 days.

Support

The Updates Section

2 min read Feature   The Updates Section allows you and your team to communicate social media style inside an item, keeping all the conversations about a specific task or project in the sam...

This does not suit everyone.

There is an existing Feature Request for blue to mean “unread” and grey to mean “read” to assist remote working.

Ideas to make remote working easier Feature requests
During this time, when everyone is working remotely, here are some ideas that I think would make a huge difference. The conversation bubble - it should be blue when you have a new unread comment and gray when you already read the comment. This way someone can just look at a board and see everything new for them. Inbox - replies when you are tagged should be listed there, NOT just the first time that you are tagged ( I heard that you are working on this) Have a number showing you the upd…

posts.author: MikeP (Mike Pugh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Why are some updates blue and some grey?

The colour change is a GREAT idea! We use this to know when to get back in contact with a client.

Question/Request: While this is globally set at 7 days, can this be made into a varible?

i.e. Could I set the colour change to 14 days or 21 days?
(This shouldn’t be too difficult as it would only effect the color change.)

We then have instant knowledge (visual) and can target our work even more efficiently.

Appreicate you giving this your consideration.

If you do decide this is worthwhile, can you let me know what the build timreframe would look like?Thank you, Mike

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
